name: ios-skills
description: 210 iOS/Swift/Xcode agent skills with phase-aware routing. Full lifecycle: ideation → design → develop → test → deploy → iterate.

interface.longDescription: Phase-aware iOS/Swift/Xcode skill bundle with router and hook-based auto-injection. Covers ideation, design, develop, test, deploy, and iterate phases. Skills from twostraws, AvdLee, dpearson2699, Dimillian, and 24 more authors.
defaultPrompt: Help me build, test, debug, or ship an iOS app with the right skills auto-routed.
